surfaces.rationale: Single Grok Build slash-skill entry point for all user-facing orchestration.
surfaces.host_boundary: Grok Build user skill; installed via ~/.grok/skills/omgb symlink.

surfaces.rationale: Skills-only local plugin manifest, not a separate command surface.
surfaces.host_boundary: Declares exactly skills/omgb and no hooks/MCP/commands/agents.

surfaces.rationale: Compatibility manifest for plugin packaging; not user-invocable.
Sixteen per-role prompts/configs are activated by /omgb launchers, not default slash commands.
surfaces.host_boundary: Grok --agents inputs only; no registered agent plugin surface.

surfaces.rationale: Developer-run launch/handoff helpers for explicit CLI workflows.
surfaces.host_boundary: Local shell scripts; no automatic daemon or hook behavior.

surfaces.rationale: Install, doctor, and e2e checks are explicit maintenance commands.
surfaces.host_boundary: Local filesystem and Grok CLI checks only.

surfaces.rationale: Validation and audit gates support release readiness; they are not plugin surfaces.
